extraction.article_title: Citizen Lab: Law Enforcement Used Webloc to Track 500 Million Devices via Ad Data

ttps.description: Gather Victim Identity Information by correlating mobile device identifiers, app-derived profile data, and geolocation records to track individuals at scale.
Collect Victim Network Information through purchased advertising and app telemetry datasets used for location intelligence and behavioral analysis.

attack_chain: Acquire mobile advertising and app telemetry data from brokers or data aggregators
Correlate device identifiers with location coordinates and profile attributes
Use layered geospatial analysis to reconstruct movement patterns and likely home/work locations
Operationalize results for surveillance, targeting, or investigative workflows

proposed_vectors.name_ko: 광고 데이터 기반 지리 위치 감시
